decisions.question: Backend test framework
decisions.rationale: Fast, native TS/ESM, Jest-compatible API. Modern standard for Node/TypeScript projects.

decisions.question: Frontend / integration testing
decisions.rationale: Tests the real app end-to-end in a browser. Validates actual user flows. Browsers must be installed via 'npx playwright install' after npm install — version must match the project dependency.

decisions.question: Coverage strategy
decisions.answer: Spec verification tests — one test per 'How to verify' block in PROJECT_SPEC.md
decisions.rationale: Acceptance-test focused. Every spec requirement with a verification scenario gets a corresponding test.

decisions.question: Test plan requirement
decisions.answer: Mandatory test plan per ticket at tests/plans/<ticket-id>.md before writing any test code
decisions.rationale: Forces the tester to think about what cases to cover, documents the reasoning, and provides an audit trail proving the tester ran for each ticket.

decisions.question: Seed data strategy
decisions.answer: Shared fixture at tests/fixtures/seed.sql (~200 lines) loaded in beforeAll/beforeEach. Must include identity resolution scenarios.
decisions.rationale: Tests without data are meaningless. Every test must run against realistic data including anonymous-only, anonymous->identified, and multi-device users.

guardrails: Every BR-xxx requirement with a 'How to verify' block must have a corresponding test
Identity resolution must be tested with the exact scenarios from the spec
E2E tests must run against the real app with sample data loaded
A test plan (tests/plans/<ticket-id>.md) MUST be committed before test code for every ticket
Test plan MUST list every MUST requirement and at least one test case per requirement
Test plan MUST include edge cases (empty input, invalid data, boundary values)
All tests MUST load tests/fixtures/seed.sql for data — no tests against empty databases
Seed fixture MUST include anonymous-only, anonymous->identified, and multi-device identity scenarios
